Poker Hand #SG6001: Tournament #200000001, Spin & Gold $5 Hold'em No Limit - Level1(10/20) - 2026/06/01 13:00:00
Table '200000001 1' 6-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Hero (500 in chips)
Seat 2: a1b2c3 (500 in chips)
Seat 3: d4e5f6 (500 in chips)
Seat 4: g7h8i9 (500 in chips)
Seat 5: j1k2l3 (500 in chips)
Seat 6: m4n5o6 (500 in chips)
a1b2c3: posts small blind 10
d4e5f6: posts big blind 20
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Js Jd]
g7h8i9: folds
j1k2l3: folds
m4n5o6: folds
Hero: raises 40 to 60
a1b2c3: folds
d4e5f6: calls 40
*** FLOP *** [9s 4h 2d]
d4e5f6: checks
Hero: bets 70
d4e5f6: folds
Hero collected 150 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 150 | Rake 0
Board [9s 4h 2d]
